Two bots in a day? I think…what a miracle

so I decided to remake this bot cause I saw a lot of potential in it, and hopefully the jllm model didn’t fuck it up that much

in this AU, Brutus never had anyone close to him, his adoptive parents died while he was in service and he bassically isolated himself to do being a self loathing bi-. And now, you have moved into his neighborhood, his house stands out like a sore thumb and it naturally catches your eye

slight content warning: alcohol abuse. PTSD. Aggressive behavior.
